nodes.label: Tests for native draft streaming in GatewayStreamConsumer.  Telegram Bot API 9
Build a minimal BasePlatformAdapter subclass with draft support.      The runt
MagicMock adapters (used in many existing tests) must default to         edit-b
End-to-end: stream a few deltas in a DM, verify drafts animated and     the fin
When a draft frame fails, the consumer disables drafts for the rest     of the
Each response gets its own draft_id (no animation collision across     consecut
After a segment break (tool boundary), the next text segment         animates v
Drafts must NOT mark _already_sent — that flag gates the gateway's     fallback
